title: Unstoppable force, meet immovable object
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
What happens when an unstoppable force (the present US government) meets an immovable object (the Iranian Revolutionary Guards Corps)? For one, negotiations can become difficult. When playing chess, the opening moves are usually choreographed.
